creator: dave.raynor@gmail.com
text:
The current p5-Dancer 1.3512 is incompatible with the latest version of textproc/p5-YAML, which is 1.30.

The first item listed in the changelog for the 1.3513 release is to fix that problem, and has been available since January 2020.

See https://metacpan.org/release/Dancer for more details.
